THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TY, HENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ, MARVIN JESUS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,610.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
